/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/st3sh.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/st3sh.dir/src/exec/builtin/builtin.c.o CMakeFiles/st3sh.dir/src/exec/exec.c.o CMakeFiles/st3sh.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/st3sh.dir/src/parse/charIn/charIn.c.o CMakeFiles/st3sh.dir/src/parse/cmd/cmd.c.o CMakeFiles/st3sh.dir/src/parse/redirect/redirect.c.o CMakeFiles/st3sh.dir/src/parse/separator/separator.c.o CMakeFiles/st3sh.dir/src/parse/token/token.c.o -o st3sh
